title: filago supina
intro: Filago supina, also known as lesser clematis or small clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Filago supina include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
